meta.title: Karobaar CRM | Built for Coaching Classes & Teams
meta.description: Close more admissions, track geofenced teacher attendance, and calculate visiting faculty payroll from one real-time workspace.

announcement.text: New: Geofenced teacher attendance & faculty payroll now live →

hero.kicker: THE CRM THAT RUNS YOUR WHOLE TEAM
hero.headline: Manage customers, attendance, and payroll — without juggling three tools.
hero.subline: Built for growing Indian teams who are tired of stitching tools together.

without.title: The Old Way
painPoints: Student lists in an Excel file no one updates

interactiveSolutions.title: Unified Admission Kanban
interactiveSolutions.description: WhatsApp student inquiries automatically log into the CRM pipeline. Track every demo class from booked to attended.

interactiveSolutions.title: Single Student Profile
interactiveSolutions.description: Every parent contact, demo lecture history, and installment schedule updates in real-time.

interactiveSolutions.title: Fee Quotations
interactiveSolutions.description: Generate GST-compliant fee receipts and installment plans. Send professional estimates directly to parents via WhatsApp.

interactiveSolutions.title: Visiting Faculty Payroll
interactiveSolutions.description: The geofenced check-in log flows directly into the faculty payroll calculator. Hourly rates and per-lecture payouts are processed instantly.

architecture.headline: The complete educational lifecycle.
architecture.subline: From the first inquiry call to the final course completion. Karobaar handles your entire coaching center operations.

flowSteps.title: Inquiries & Pipelines
flowSteps.description: Visualize your counseling pipeline. Drag and drop student leads through customized demo and enrollment stages.

flowSteps.title: Student & Parent Ledger
flowSteps.description: Every admission enriches your Student directory. View complete payment schedules, installment balances, and activity logs.

flowSteps.title: Fee Structure Estimates
flowSteps.description: Pull courses directly from your Course Catalog to generate professional, accurate fee quotations in seconds.

flowSteps.title: Center Performance Analytics
flowSteps.description: Monitor counselor win rates, track total enrollment trends, and manage pending fee collections from one executive dashboard.

sections.title: Custom Counseling Pipelines
sections.description: Don't force your enrollment process into rigid boxes. Build custom stages, counselor assignment rules, and follow-up schedules that match how your center operates.

sections.title: Visiting Faculty Payroll Engine
sections.description: Stop auditing manual teacher spreadsheets. Faculty attendance checks directly flow into automated, per-lecture salary calculations including TDS and cash-advance tracking.

sections.title: Geofenced Staff Attendance Logs
sections.description: Ensure absolute accountability. Teachers and receptionists log attendance via the app with GPS geofencing, restricted to center coordinates.

benchmark.headline: Why coaching centers switch to Karobaar.

testimonialsGrid.title: Loved by coaching directors
testimonialsGrid.description: Real feedback from educational business owners using Karobaar to run their operations.

items.text: Karobaar completely transformed our counseling process. Inquiries are tracked properly, and our demo attendance rate skyrocketed.
items.name: Ankit Kumar

items.text: Before this platform, our inquiries were scattered across notebooks and Excel sheets. Now everything is unified and our counselor performance is clear.
items.name: Aryan Bhosle

items.text: Calculating visiting faculty salary used to take me 3 full days of auditing registers. The geofenced class log handles everything automatically. Amazing!
items.name: VikasRaj Yadav

pricing.headline: Simple pricing for coaching centers.
pricing.trialNote: 14-day free trial · no credit card required

questions.question: How long does setup take?
questions.answer: Most centers are live in under 30 minutes. We import your student database for free.

questions.question: Can I migrate my student records from Excel?
questions.answer: Yes. Our team handles your database migration for free so you can start right away.

questions.question: How does visiting faculty payroll work?
questions.answer: Visiting faculty check-in via geofencing and log their lectures. The system automatically computes their salaries based on hourly/lecture slabs at month-end.

questions.question: Can we send fee receipts automatically on parent WhatsApp?
questions.answer: Yes. Once an installment receipt is generated, it triggers an automated message directly to the parent's phone.

finalCta.headline: Ready to digitize your operations?
finalCta.subline: Join growing coaching academies streamlining admissions and payroll with Karobaar.
